title: Trilegal advises Apollo on subscribing to $500 million notes issued by an Adani Energy Solutions entity
description: Apollo has subscribed to $500 million investment-grade, rated, senior secured, privately placed notes issued by ATSOL Global IFSC Limited, a step-down subsidiary of Adani Energy Solutions Limited.Trilegal advised Apollo on this transaction.The Trilegal Capital Markets team advising on the matter was led by Richa Choudhary (Partner) and comprised Maitreya Rajurkar (Partner), Avanti Kale (Counsel), and Associates Siddhant Mishra and Srishti Multani.The Trilegal Corporate team advising on the matte
